reported_symptom: While typing in the textbox, the app still showed the loading state, and typing a character could stall for about a second.

relationship_to_other_rows.M25-DOGFOOD-03: Interactive typing latency and global loading behavior while the app is busy.

triage_note: This must be measured separately from startup. A future implementation should capture keydown-to-candidate latency, worker queue wait time, worker processKey roundtrip, and React render/update time.
